subcodes.first_line: O Aba 'Alí! Blessed art thou, for God hath manifested from thy loins one through whose remembrance the dead are quickened, drawn by divine attraction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابا علی طوبی لک بما اظهر الله من صلبک من تحرک بذکره الاموات قد اخذه جذب
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
